title: runx skill: standup digest from work events
minimal_official_session_actions: Claim Frantic #36 only in an authorized Frantic official session if #36 is still open and available.
Provide Frantic-required identity/contact proof only through official UI; do not send token, cookie, localStorage, password, OTP, email proof, or identity material to agents.
In authorized runx/GitHub publishing session, publish exact package name standup-digest only if operator accepts account/publication risk.
Create public source repository/branch/commit containing the local package files.
Open public PR to runxhq/runx containing SKILL.md, X.yaml, run.mjs, fixtures, and harness/evidence files.
Produce live registry public_url, fixed source_url, pr_url, raw x_yaml, raw skill_md, public evidence_json, public verification_json, receipt_ref, and public report.
Run Frantic preflight against those refs.
Deliver #36 through Frantic official session only if preflight passes.
stop_gates: claim requires token/cookie/session data to be copied outside official UI
runx publish requires exposing credentials to agents
public PR would include secrets/private data/account material
payout setup requires payment/KYC/tax/address/bank/wallet data; user/operator handles privately

income_gate.rule: Counts only after Frantic accepts/pays or USD 10 reward is received and usable.
